'''Bensin Tomri''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Shortly before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he, [[Danni Quee]], and [[Cho Badeleg]] took the [[Spacecaster-class shuttle|Spacecaster]] to investigate a presumed [[Comet/Legends|comet]] crashing on [[Helska IV]]. Bensin was very excited, as [[Yomin Carr]] theorized that since the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was made of ice, the collision could cause it to explode. In actuality, it was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]]'s [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]], and when they arrived, they were taken prisoner by Da'Gara and his large crew. Cho was already dead when Danni came around. She then saw Bensin have his neck tilted backward, and a Vong warrior drove his fist into the man's throat, killing him.<ref name="VP" />
